---
title: "test_bridge.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_bridge.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.72
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.10
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestAntigravityBridge, test_ansi_stripping.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestAntigravityBridge and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)

### Exports
- `TestAntigravityBridge`
- `test_ansi_stripping`
- `test_json_extraction_with_noise`
- `test_malformed_input`
